screen_metadata.name: Universal Ledger & Chart of Accounts Command Center

1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px grid scaling down to 1024px tablet landscape)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Three-Column Split Ledger Shell (Left: Sidebar Navigation, Center-Left: Interactive COA Nested Tree, Center-Right: Multi-tenant Ledger Data Grid, Contextual Overlays: Sliding Right-Drawer for Account Configuration Details)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Full tree view alongside ledger data table grid)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (COA structural tree collapses into an expandable slide-out left panel drawer)

key_visible_sections.title: Chart of Accounts Hierarchical Graph View

user_progression_routes.on_load: Execute auth-token validation -> Pull active multi-tenant legal_entity_id context -> Request initial payload data state from UniversalLedgerService.getChartOfAccounts()
user_progression_routes.on_account_select: Hydrate ledger_data_grid lines with selected account_code ledger history rows asynchronously

redirection_rules.condition: If legal_entity_id context is completely missing or null
redirection_rules.action: Hard redirect the browser router framework instantly to global workspace manager selection profile screen at route path '/onboarding/tenant-select'

modal_and_drawer_overlays.behavior: Pop center dialog modal layout blocking parent window pointer interactions until submission completion or manual keyboard Escape dismissal triggers
Slide out 450px wide vertical panel context container tracking history lines from viewport edge right side margin

atoms.type: Text Field Input Box with Clear button wrapper

props.placeholder: Search account code or classification labels...

molecules.composition: Combines toggle chevron fold/unfold atom icon + account code numeric typography node + name description string label + conditional inline context status pill indicator
events: onClick: sets state variable active_node_pointer_id to item entity tracking key

molecules.composition: Combines global multi-tenant filter drop-downs + text searching input block + tabular view layout configuration switcher elements

organisms.composition: Nested recursive iteration stack loops mapping top-level Root domains (Assets, Liabilities, Equity) down to individual operational child nodes via tree list grouping elements.
Virtual scroll multi-column data sheet structure wrapping high-precision column alignments for ledger entries featuring header row controls supporting sort algorithms.

typography_tokens.font_family_stack: Inter UI, system-ui, sans-serif (Engineered strictly for numeric readability)

scales.table_numeric_values: font-size: 0.875rem (14px) | font-family: 'JetBrains Mono' or monospace tabular numerals variance | font-weight: 500

color_palette_hex.background_canvas_base: #0B0F19 (Deep Obsidian Enterprise Tech Dark Mode Base Layout Grid)

spacing_and_borders.table_row_height_density: 2.25rem (36px micro padding dense rows to maximize view data visualization matrix blocks)

micro_interactions.style_mutation: background-color: transform color change to #334155 over 150ms timing parameter using ease-out curve profiles
transform scale downward matching 0.98 sizing metrics to yield tangible haptic click profile context responses

accessibility_aria_roles.chart_of_accounts_structural_graph_viewp: role='tree' parsing nested child components mapped explicitly to semantic treeitem element nodes populated with valid aria-expanded boolean properties
accessibility_aria_roles.ledger_master_transaction_grid_container: role='grid' parsing system tracking grids accompanied by clean row column structural layout annotations

children_nodes.account_name: Operating Liquidity Holding Bank Vault (Silicon Valley Bank Profile Account)

local_reactive_state_variables.active_node_pointer_id: Tracks currently selected node in the account structural tree interface stack layout (string | null default value)
local_reactive_state_variables.is_create_modal_visible: Boolean state toggling the display matrix overlay layer for the New Account setup interface
local_reactive_state_variables.account_search_query_filter: String variable binding reactive mutations to standard list key matching functions instantly on text keystroke update triggers

global_application_context_bindings.active_selected_legal_entity_id: Shared application session string managing asset tenant domain tracking hooks globally across standard system runtime scopes
global_application_context_bindings.universal_ledger_data_buffer_cache: Storage allocation buffer saving ledger row segments to prevent repeating network request transactions across tab navigations

8_technical_requirements.frontend_technical_constraints: Vanilla HTML5 + Tailwind CSS Framework CDN execution environments using localized ES6 JavaScript modules with zero heavy dependencies or complex compiler setups
8_technical_requirements.performance_benchmarks: Virtual tree item structures matching deep nested row lists must calculate data state updates without triggering browser paint cycle delays exceeding a strict target threshold boundary of 16ms

element_interaction_links.target_mutation_action: Populate state tracking variable ledger_master_transaction_grid_container data arrays
Append return record array mapping context into chart_of_accounts_hierarchy deep structure graph and dismiss modal state visibility flag variable

element_interaction_links.navigates_to_route: /finance/journal-entries (Triggers transition flow directly to Screen 2 Viewport)
